evidence.text: product. Your developers are your customers. Your platform is your product. You need product thinking: user research, feedback loops, iteration, and the willingness to kill features that aren’t working. The Anatomy of an Internal Developer Platform Every IDP I’ve built or worked with has roughly the same layers, even if the specific tools differ. Understanding these layers helps you figure out where to start and what to prioritise. The bottom layer is your infrastructure orchestration. This is where your Terraform modules live, your cloud provider APIs, your Kubernetes clusters. It’s the raw capability. Most organisations already have this

title: Platform Engineering: Building an Internal Developer Platform | Andrew Odendaal
